name: Redfish En Croute Aux Deux Mousses
recipeIngredient: 5 lb Redfish, whole (or other firm fleshed fish)
Puff pastry, sheet, 12" x 14", frozen or homemade
recipeInstructions:
1 Remove the fish filets from the backbone, keeping the head and tail intact.
2 Roll the pastry into a rectangle and place the head, tail and bottom filet on the pastry.
3 Spread one filet with some salmon mousse and then some spinach mousse.
4 Cover with the top filet.
5 Brush the pastry with melted butter and trim it down to the shape of a fish.
6 Fold over half of the pastry and brush again with melted butter.
7 Fold over the other side and smooth into a fish silhouette.
8 Brush the pastry once more and decorate with pastry scraps cut into the shapes of scales and fins.
9 Place the pastry on a lightly buttered baking sheet.
10 Preheat oven to 350°F.
11 Bake until golden, about 40 minutes.
12 Serve with Beurre Blanc.
